stemHtml: Your call sign is AIRFLY12345. You are in contact with Barcelona approach flying at FL350 passing overhead BCN VOR. The aircraft suffers a depressurisation. How do you communicate the distress situation?

options.a: Mayday, mayday, mayday, Barcelona approach, AIRFLY12345, depressurisation problem, descending FL100, passing VOR, mayday.
options.b: Mayday, mayday, mayday, Barcelona approach, AIRFLY12345, passing BCN VOR, descending FL100, depressurisation problem.
options.c: Mayday, mayday, mayday, Barcelona approach, AIRFLY12345, depressurisation problem, descending FL100, passing BCN VOR.
options.d: Barcelona Approach AIRFLY12345 depressurisation problem descending FL100, VOR passed, mayday.
